aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to critical gaps in structured data and authority signals, despite decent content and NAP consistency.
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema to capture common questions

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is under-optimized and marked as permanently closed, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Opportunity to add more photos and regular posts

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing the business as a reliable authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local service queries and disaster restoration requests.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to capture AI attention.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, expertise, and media presence to establish authority in restoration services.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by fixing your schema and GBP gaps today.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Being marked as permanently closed on Google and lacking structured data means losing 40% of potential leads to AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Despite a 4.8 rating and 103 reviews, the business is invisible to AI assistants due to critical schema and GBP issues.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach optimizes your GBP, implements critical schema, and amplifies authority signals to make your business AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are capturing market share; act now to stay relevant.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth: Fix your schema and GBP gaps today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and identified critical gaps that are preventing AI assistants from recognizing your business.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven searches.
